items.front: When are ATC light signals used?
items.back: Use them to control aircraft and movement-area vehicles, equipment, or personnel when radio communications cannot be used.

items.front: When is the alternating red-and-green warning signal used?
items.back: Use it as a general warning for collision hazards, possible mechanical trouble, or other hazardous conditions requiring extreme caution.

items.front: How can an aircraft with receiver-only capability acknowledge tower instructions?
items.back: By rocking wings, moving controls on the ground, or flashing navigation, landing, or search lights, depending on aircraft type and whether it is day or night.
